title_cn: 随着芯片制造商的上涨，股市停止连续下滑：市场结束
summary: Stocks halted back-to-back losses as chipmakers bounced while a rally in oil faded on hopes the US and Iran could revive a peace deal.

title: Gold Steadies as Traders Assess Rate Path Amid US-Iran Conflict
title_cn: 交易员评估美伊冲突期间的利率走势，金价持稳
summary: Gold steadied after escalating US-Iran clashes over the weekend were followed by reports of mediation efforts, with traders assessing the likelihood of the Federal Reserve raising interest rates to contain inflation.

title: Lionheart (CUB) Nears $400 Million Deal for Venezuela Oil Stake
title_cn: Lionheart (CUB) 接近以 4 亿美元收购委内瑞拉石油股份
summary: Lionheart Capital is close to a $400 million deal for a stake in a Venezuelan oil field, in what would be one of the first major private investments in the country’s oil industry since the US began easing sanctions.

title: Netflix Taps US High-Grade Bond Market With $1 Billion Debt Sale
title_cn: Netflix 进军美国高等级债券市场 出售 10 亿美元债券
summary: Netflix Inc. is set to raise $1 billion from a US high-grade bond sale, its first since a debut deal two years ago, as slowing sales growth fuels investor scrutiny of the company’s future.

title: Goldman to Sell $2.5 Billion Preferreds Following Spread Low
title_cn: 高盛将在价差低位后出售 25 亿美元优先股
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. is selling new preferred shares Monday, just days after a metric determining risk and value in these securities hit its lowest level since the global financial crisis.

title: US Immigration Policies Sink Mexican Grocery Chain Chedraui
title_cn: 美国移民政策导致墨西哥杂货连锁店 Chedraui 陷入困境
summary: President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown is causing the worst rout on the Mexican stock exchange this year.

title: Money Funds Keep Cash Closer as Fed Leaves Markets Guessing
title_cn: 美联储让市场猜测，货币基金让现金更加接近
summary: Money‑market funds are shifting toward ultra short-term holdings and away from assets with even modest interest-rate risk as uncertainty grows over the Federal Reserve’s policy path and the near-term outlook for rates.

title: BlackRock Eyes More Than $12 Billion Debt for Data Center
title_cn: 贝莱德预计数据中心债务将超过 120 亿美元
summary: BlackRock Inc. is looking to sell more than $12 billion of bonds to help finance a Meta Platforms Inc. data center campus in El Paso, Texas, according to people with knowledge of the transaction, the latest in a string of debt deals fueling tech companies’ massive investments in artificial intelligence.

title: US Stocks Rebound From Selloff as Nvidia, Other Chipmakers Rise
title_cn: 随着英伟达和其他芯片制造商上涨，美国股市从抛售中反弹
summary: US stocks advanced on Monday, paring last week’s slump, as chipmakers rebounded ahead of a deluge of earnings reports that will test whether Big Tech’s profits can match high expectations.

title: Latin America Outperforms as Emerging Market Currencies Gain
title_cn: 随着新兴市场货币上涨，拉丁美洲表现优于大盘
summary: Emerging-market currencies gained to start the week, with Latin American names getting a boost from a drop in volatility and carry appeal.

title: Shipowners Offer Huge Bonuses to Get Crews to Sail Hormuz
title_cn: 船东提供巨额奖金以吸引船员航行霍尔木兹
summary: One shipowner is attempting to coax crews to sail through the Strait of Hormuz by offering them an extra six months pay if they’re willing to cross the vital oil channel, offering seafarers a stark choice between large financial rewards and the risk of death.

title: The Oil Shock Isn’t Over

summary: Releasing barrels of crude was the easy part.

summary: National Bank of Canada is assessing investors’ appetite for a significant risk transfer deal, adding its name to a growing list of lenders exploring the instruments as a way to create room on their balance sheets.

title: DoubleLine Says Higher Bond Yields to Help Fed Keep Rates Steady
title_cn: DoubleLine表示更高的债券收益率有助于美联储保持利率稳定
summary: DoubleLine is positioning in shorter-dated government bonds on the view that Kevin Warsh’s credibility with investors will help allow Federal Reserve officials to keep interest rates steady this year.

title_cn: Alkegen 计划预先破产以获取新鲜现金
summary: Alkegen has signed a restructuring deal with lenders that will inject the specialty materials maker with new money and slash its debt load by about $3.1 billion.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
title_cn: 7 月 20 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil swung sharply between gains and losses in a fraught session as traders grappled with a barrage of headlines that suggest a worsening of the Middle East conflict, as well as attempts to bring about a pause in the war.

title: KKR, Vauban Among Final Contenders to Buy Portugal’s DStelecom
title_cn: KKR 和 Vauban 是收购葡萄牙 DStelecom 的最终竞争者
summary: KKR & Co. and Vauban Infrastructure Partners are competing to acquire a majority stake in Portuguese fiber operator DStelecom, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: INR/USD: HSBC Offers Indian Diaspora 19x Leverage on FCNR(B) Deposits

summary: Giant venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz has hired defense and space technology investor Connor Love, adding a military veteran and prominent VC to a team focused on startups critical to US interests.

title: Alibaba Fined Record €550 Million by EU for Illegal Sales
title_cn: 阿里巴巴因非法销售被欧盟处以创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元罚款
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s e-commerce service was fined €550 million ($629 million) by the European Union for selling illegal products in the largest penalty under the bloc’s content moderation rulebook.

title: Google Shares Gain on Report of Chip to Boost AI Efficiency
title_cn: 谷歌股价因芯片提升人工智能效率的报告而上涨
summary: Shares of Google owner Alphabet Inc. gained on a report that the company is developing a server chip designed to optimize its Gemini artificial intelligence model.

title_cn: Z.AI用中国芯片建成巨型数据中心来训练人工智能
summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a giant data center that houses only Chinese-made chips, a big step in Beijing’s efforts to replace restricted Nvidia Corp. silicon for future AI development.

summary: Crowds rushed to an obscure corner of China’s premier tech summit, moving past monumental booths from Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. to catch a glimpse of the hottest name in domestic AI.

summary: Singles are outsourcing chats to ChatGPT and Claude, complicating how romantic connections begin

title: Influencers Are Being Paid to Spread the Mormon Church's Gospel
title_cn: 有影响力的人接受报酬来传播摩门教的福音
summary: Through its for-profit subsidiary, the church owns several advertising companies with influencer-marketing arms

title: Moonshot’s Kimi K3 May Be More About Memory Than Compute
title_cn: Moonshot 的 Kimi K3 可能更注重内存而不是计算
summary: When DeepSeek’s R1 debuted in early 2025, almost $600 billion was wiped out from Nvidia Corp.’s market value in a single day on fears that artificial intelligence would require less computing power than previously expected. Moonshot AI’s release of Kimi K3 on Friday triggered a similar reaction, helping push semiconductor stocks sharply lower.

title: Chinese Stocks Rebound After National Team Support Resurfaces
title_cn: 国家队支持重新出现后中国股市反弹
summary: Chinese shares rose after a choppy session, amid signs of late buying by state funds as authorities intensified efforts to salvage a slumping market.

title: Moonshot Is Creating New Winners and Losers in the AI Trade
title_cn: Moonshot 正在人工智能行业创造新的赢家和输家
summary: Moonshot AI’s surprise release of a new artificial intelligence model has sent a jolt through markets, forcing investors to reassess some of the biggest assumptions behind the global tech rally.

title: AI Is ‘New Engine’ Keeping Chinese Economy From Harder Landing
title_cn: 人工智能是中国经济避免硬着陆的“新引擎”
summary: A global rush to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure has turned the technology into a key pocket of growth in China’s economy during one of its weakest stretches in years.

title: Prysmian Signs $6.3 Billion Molex Deal for Data-Center Gear
title_cn: Prysmian 与 Molex 签署价值 63 亿美元的数据中心设备交易
summary: Prysmian SpA signed a deal worth as much €5.5 billion ($6.3 billion) to supply Koch Inc.’s Molex with optical cables for its data centers, tapping into the artificial-intelligence build-out.

title_cn: Kimi K3能否帮助中国击败美国取得人工智能主导地位？：现场问答
summary: Bloomberg reporters answer your questions on China’s push to lead the AI race on July 20 at 3 p.m. HKT / 8 a.m. BST

title: Blackstone Agrees to Invest in Korean Robotics Supplier Futronic
title_cn: Blackstone 同意投资韩国机器人供应商 Futronic
summary: Blackstone Inc. has agreed to invest in Futronic, a South Korean supplier of high-precision actuators used in industrial robotics and the automotive sector.

title: Alibaba Shares Rise After Unveiling Upgraded Flagship AI Model
title_cn: 推出升级版旗舰人工智能模型后阿里巴巴股价上涨
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. shares rose as much as 5.4% on Monday after the company launched a preview version of its flagship Qwen3.8 Max model, describing it as second only to Anthropic PBC’s Fable 5.

title: AI Pioneer Kai-Fu Lee’s Startup Targets Hong Kong IPO Next Year
title_cn: 人工智能先驱李开复的初创公司计划明年在香港上市
summary: 01.ai, the Chinese AI startup founded by computer scientist Kai-Fu Lee, is pushing ahead with plans to raise funds before an initial public offering in 2027.

title: Moutai Hikes Price of Flagship Liquor for Second Time in Months
title_cn: 茅台数月内第二次上调旗舰酒价格
summary: Kweichow Moutai Co. raised prices of its flagship Feitian Moutai spirit for the second time in several months, as China’s biggest liquor maker works to boost margins hit by sagging demand.

title: Traders Cut Taiwan Stock Leverage at Fastest Pace in 15 Months
title_cn: 交易员以 15 个月来最快的速度削减台股杠杆
summary: Taiwan’s retail investors unwound their leveraged stock bets at the fastest pace since April 2025 on Friday, helping drive the local equity market into a technical correction.

title: El Mayo Gets Life in Jail Over Role in Drug Cartel
title_cn: 埃尔梅奥因参与贩毒集团而被判终身监禁
summary: Mexican drug lord Ismael “El Mayo” Zambada Garcia was sentenced to life in prison for his role in running the violent Sinaloa cartel, ordering the murder of scores of people and importing massive amounts of cocaine, fentanyl and heroin into the US.

title: Darline Graham Says She’s Running for South Carolina Senate
title_cn: 达琳·格雷厄姆说她正在竞选南卡罗来纳州参议员
summary: Republican Senator Darline Graham said she plans to run in November’s midterm elections for the seat held by her late brother, Lindsey Graham.

title: Trump Vows Iran Will Pay for Deaths as Mediators Push Truce
title_cn: 特朗普誓言伊朗将为调解者推动停战造成的死亡付出代价
summary: President Donald Trump vowed that Iran “will pay” for killing three US soldiers in recent days, even as mediators proposed a new truce with the Middle East war widening further.

title: Burnham to Seek ‘Flexibility’ Within Existing Fiscal Rules
title_cn: 伯纳姆将在现有财政规则中寻求“灵活性”
summary: Britain’s new prime minister, Andy Burnham, said he would use “flexibility” within the UK’s fiscal rules and push borrowing closer to the limits of what investors will tolerate as he seeks to reboot the slow-growing economy.

title: Hungarian Chess Champion Polgar Turns Down Presidency Offer
title_cn: 匈牙利国际象棋冠军波尔加拒绝担任总统
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar suffered his first major setback since taking office after chess legend Judit Polgar declined to be nominated as president just a day after he had publicly endorsed her.

title: Trump Says Netanyahu Won’t Be Arrested After Mamdani Threat
title_cn: 特朗普称内塔尼亚胡不会在马姆达尼威胁后被捕
summary: President Donald Trump said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu “will not be arrested” in the US, rebuffing New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s suggestion that such an apprehension could happen.

title: Andy Burnham Names John Healey Chancellor in Surprise UK Cabinet Move
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 任命约翰·希利 (John Healey) 为财政大臣，英国内阁变动令人惊讶
summary: Britain’s new prime minister, Andy Burnham, named former Defense Secretary John Healey to be his chancellor of the exchequer in a surprise move that will fuel speculation about a bigger increase in military spending.

title: Ukraine Dronemaker Testing New Long-Range Weapon Aimed at Russia
title_cn: 乌克兰无人机制造商测试针对俄罗斯的新型远程武器
summary: SkyFall, the Ukrainian defense technology company, has developed a long-range strike weapon that is being tested in operations against Russia, as Kyiv steps up a campaign that has caused severe logistical problems for Moscow.

title: Trump Suits Reach Key Stages After Pair of Recent Setbacks
title_cn: 在最近的两次挫折之后，特朗普诉讼达到了关键阶段
summary: Lawyers for President Donald Trump and his sprawling business interests are heading to court this week in Florida for high-stakes hearings that follow a pair of major setbacks in their wave of multibillion-dollar lawsuits.

title: Congressman Russell Fry Enters Senate Race to Replace Graham
title_cn: 国会议员拉塞尔·弗莱参加参议院竞选以取代格雷厄姆
summary: Rep. Russell Fry (R-S.C.) announced Monday he will run for the open Senate seat left vacant by the late Sen. Lindsey Graham, who died July 11.

title: French Embassy Staff in Iran Intimidated by Security Service
title_cn: 法国驻伊朗大使馆工作人员受到安全部门的恐吓
summary: The French minister for foreign affairs said two officials from his country’s embassy in Iran were intimidated by security services on Sunday evening.

title: Yemen’s Houthis to Impose Maritime Blockade on Saudi Arabia
title_cn: 也门胡塞武装将对沙特阿拉伯实施海上封锁
summary: The Houthis, an Iran-backed Yemeni group, said they would impose a maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia, putting at risk the flow of millions of barrels that the kingdom exports via the Red Sea.

title: Thames Water Seeks Bill Hike Just as Burnham Promises Change
title_cn: 伯纳姆承诺改变，泰晤士水务公司寻求加息
summary: Thames Water, the troubled UK utility that has announced steep hikes in customer bills in recent years, is seeking another increase to fund a controversial reservoir in southeast England.

title: EU Expects to Hit $1.35 Trillion Spending Goal Agreed With Trump
title_cn: 欧盟预计将达到特朗普同意的 1.35 万亿美元支出目标
summary: The European Union expects to achieve the $1.35 trillion in investment targets set out in the trade deal it reached with President Donald Trump last year.

title: Zelenskyy Weighs Ousting Unpopular Army Chief After Protests
title_cn: 泽连斯基考虑在抗议后罢免不受欢迎的陆军参谋长
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is considering removing the head of the army, according to two people familiar with the matter, amid pressure from widespread protests demanding the military leader’s ouster.

title: Burnham Vows ‘New Economic Model’ to Bring Stability to UK
title_cn: 伯纳姆誓言“新经济模式”将为英国带来稳定
summary: Andy Burnham pledged a “new economic model” for the UK as he sought to reassure Britons his ascension as their seventh prime minister in little over a decade would bring an end to the country’s political instability.

title: Ghana Opposition Politician Jailed 20 Years for Illegal Mining
title_cn: 加纳反对派政治家因非法采矿被判入狱 20 年
summary: Ghana has sentenced a senior opposition politician to 20 years in prison after convicting him on charges linked to illegal mining, Joy FM reported.

title: The Colorful Left-Winger at the Center of Burnham’s UK Team
title_cn: 伯纳姆英国队中锋的多彩左翼
summary: Less than two years ago it looked like Louise Haigh’s political career was over. Now she’s the right-hand to UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham and central to his new government.

title: Angry Students Face Police Batons, Tear Gas in Delhi Protest
title_cn: 愤怒的学生在德里抗议中面对警棍和催泪瓦斯
summary: Police in New Delhi used tear gas and batons to disperse thousands of young people attempting to march to India’s parliament on Monday, drawing attention to a growing education crisis that’s fueled anger at Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government.

title: Hamas Picks Iran-Aligned Khalil Al-Hayya as Its Top Leader
title_cn: 哈马斯任命与伊朗结盟的哈利勒·哈亚为其最高领导人
summary: The militant Palestinian group Hamas chose as the head of its executive body Gaza-born Khalil Al-Hayya, a close affiliate of Iran, over a competitor favored more by Sunni Arab nations.
